title: this is my space.
body: no rules here. just vibes, thoughts, things i'm into and things i'm making. welcome.

title: made something for my dad.
body: spent way too long animating a little video that says i love you daddy. it broke three times. totally worth it.

title: currently obsessed with how things work.
body: not in a nerdy way. just... there's something beautiful about understanding the logic behind things. like the world makes more sense when you look closer.
